member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.IFunctionalExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending Func Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.IFunctionalExtensions.ProcessCtvPerPin(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Processes per pin ctv capture. This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.param: CTV data collected by functional test.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.IFunctionalExtensions.ProcessFailures(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest)
member.summary: Processes failure capture test. This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.IFunctionalExtensions.ProcessCtvPerCycle(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureCtvPerCycleTest)
member.summary: Processes captureCtvPerCycle test This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.param: Per cycle ctv test to be processed.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.IFunctionalExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for executing different variations of functional test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode
member.summary: Enum to determine state of CTV cycle capture mode. Enabled means ctv capture is by cycle, disabled means ctv capture will be by pin.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode.ENABLED
member.summary: ENABLED sets ctv capture to be by cycle.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode.DISABLED
member.summary: DISABLED sets ctv capture to be by pin.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes
member.summary: Defines the different modes for the AlarmPortRedirect functionality.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes.DISABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is disabled, the port on an alarm event will be the default=[-2].

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes.ENABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is enabled, the port on an alarm event will be a positive value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirect
member.summary: Gets or sets the alarm port redirect disabled or enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.CtvCapturePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for CTV capture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.CtvCapturePerCycleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets CTV capture mode. If DISABLED (default), CTV capture will be per pin. If ENABLED it will be per cycle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.FailuresToCaptureTotal
member.summary: Gets or sets int for the number of global failures to capture. If 0 (default), it means failure capture is disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.FailuresToCapturePerPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets int for number of failures per pattern to capture. If 0 (default), per pattern capture is disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.MaxFailuresToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets int for the number of global failures to print to ituff. If 0 (default), it means failure prints are disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.MaxFailuresPerPatternToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets int for number of failures per pattern to print to ituff. If 0 (default), per pattern failure count defaults to MaxFailuresToItuff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.DtsConfigurationName
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration in case DTS processing is wanted.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.FunctionalTest
member.summary: Gets or sets the functional test to capture failures.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom port to be overriden by user..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Functional.PrimeFunctionalTestMethod.SetupResultsProcessing
member.summary: Setup the results processing process which will be run after execution of functional test.
